creator: devin@sevenlayer.studio
text:
Hello Jin-Sih,
 
 Thank you for this update, but version 8.59 is not a "production release" 
 of exiftool.
 
 This port tracks only the production releases of exiftool -- if you want 
 to use an intermediate release I would suggest creating a new port called 
 p5-Image-ExifTool-devel or something similar.
 
 You can see which is the current production release here: 
 http://www.sno.phy.queensu.ca/~phil/exiftool/history.html
 
 The current production release is 8.50.
 
 Regards,
 -- 
 Tod McQuillin
 
 On Sun, 12 Jun 2011, Jin-Sih Lin wrote:
 
 >
 >> Submitter-Id:	current-users
 >> Originator:	Jin-Sih Lin
 >> Organization:	FreeBSD @ Taiwan
 >> Confidential:	no
 >> Synopsis:	[PATCH] graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool: update to 8.59
 >> Severity:	non-critical
 >> Priority:	low
 >> Category:	ports
 >> Class:		update
 >> Release:	FreeBSD 8.2-STABLE i386
 >> Environment:
 > System: FreeBSD deep.tw 8.2-STABLE FreeBSD 8.2-STABLE #0: Fri Feb 25 14:49:48 CST 2011
 >> Description:
 > - Update to 8.59
 >
 > Port maintainer (devin@spamcop.net) is cc'd.
 >
 > Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99
 >> How-To-Repeat:
 >> Fix:
 >
 > --- p5-Image-ExifTool-8.59.patch begins here ---
 > diff -ruN --exclude=CVS /usr/ports/graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool.orig/Makefile /usr/ports/graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool/Makefile
 > --- /usr/ports/graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool.orig/Makefile	2011-03-11 23:16:23.000000000 +0800
 > +++ /usr/ports/graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool/Makefile	2011-06-12 23:05:48.000000000 +0800
 > @@ -12,7 +12,7 @@
 > # before updating the version of this port.
 >
 > PORTNAME=	Image-ExifTool
 > -PORTVERSION=	8.50
 > +PORTVERSION=	8.59
 > CATEGORIES=	graphics perl5
 > MASTER_SITES=	http://www.sno.phy.queensu.ca/~phil/exiftool/ \
 > 		CPAN
 > @@ -44,7 +44,8 @@
 > LANGTAGS=	cs de en_ca en_gb es fr it ja ko nl pl ru sv tr zh_cn zh_tw
 >
 > MAN3=		File::RandomAccess.3				\
 > -		Image::ExifTool.3 Image::ExifTool::MIEUnits.3	\
 > +		Image::ExifTool.3 Image::ExifTool::MIEUnits.3 \
 > +		Image::ExifTool::Import.3	\
 > 		${MANTAGS:S/^/Image::ExifTool::/:S/$/.3/}	\
 > 		${LANGTAGS:S/^/Image::ExifTool::Lang::/:S/$/.3/}
 >
 > diff -ruN --exclude=CVS /usr/ports/graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool.orig/distinfo /usr/ports/graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool/distinfo
 > --- /usr/ports/graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool.orig/distinfo	2011-03-11 23:16:23.000000000 +0800
 > +++ /usr/ports/graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool/distinfo	2011-06-12 23:01:33.000000000 +0800
 > @@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
 > -SHA256 (Image-ExifTool-8.50.tar.gz) = 2b0f76b8702cb29783b8d1dfcefaf939cfadf52b1c334e4a32ef66c769bead7a
 > -SIZE (Image-ExifTool-8.50.tar.gz) = 3137581
 > +SHA256 (Image-ExifTool-8.59.tar.gz) = 5295d08e0e8d5cec8741d8d32df6d9178246d544e9b13710358b56d6c90a8202
 > +SIZE (Image-ExifTool-8.59.tar.gz) = 3169423
 > diff -ruN --exclude=CVS /usr/ports/graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool.orig/pkg-plist /usr/ports/graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool/pkg-plist
 > --- /usr/ports/graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool.orig/pkg-plist	2011-03-11 23:16:23.000000000 +0800
 > +++ /usr/ports/graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool/pkg-plist	2011-06-12 23:06:41.000000000 +0800
 > @@ -78,6 +78,7 @@
 > %%SITE_PERL%%/Image/ExifTool/IPTC.pm
 > %%SITE_PERL%%/Image/ExifTool/ITC.pm
 > %%SITE_PERL%%/Image/ExifTool/InDesign.pm
 > +%%SITE_PERL%%/Image/ExifTool/Import.pm
 > %%SITE_PERL%%/Image/ExifTool/JPEG.pm
 > %%SITE_PERL%%/Image/ExifTool/JPEGDigest.pm
 > %%SITE_PERL%%/Image/ExifTool/JVC.pm
 > --- p5-Image-ExifTool-8.59.patch ends here ---
 >
